testIdeas.title: Verify product details page displays correctly
Verify adding a product to cart successfully
testIdeas.reason: Shopping cart is a core business flow

testIdeas.title: Verify successful user login
testIdeas.reason: Authentication is a critical business flow

testIdeas.title: Verify successful user logout
testIdeas.reason: Essential for security and session management

testIdeas.title: Verify contact message can be sent
Verify About us video modal opens and video plays

risks: Duplicate 'id' attributes (e.g., 'itemc') for category links, which is invalid HTML and can cause accessibility and scripting issues.
Video element in 'About us' modal lacks closed captions, subtitles, or transcripts, impacting accessibility for users with hearing impairments.
Potential low color contrast for text elements on gradient backgrounds (e.g., navigation links on hover, footer text), failing WCAG guidelines.
Error messages in forms (e.g., 'errors', 'errorl') may not be dynamically announced to screen readers without proper ARIA live regions.
The navigation bar has an unusually fixed height (350px), consuming excessive screen real estate and potentially hindering usability on smaller viewports.
Carousel's absolute positioning and fixed width might lead to responsiveness issues or layout overlaps on various screen sizes, despite the media query to hide it.
Lack of explicit visual feedback or success messages after form submissions (e.g., 'Send message', 'Sign up', 'Log in' buttons) for the user.
